session_fixture: Browser localStorage mobile session used because local backend pairing/status REST routes returned 404; GraphQL/workspace/file/run data used real local backend.
user_runtime_instruction: For real mobile agent execution, use Codex runtime and gpt-5.5, not Anthropic/default runtime. Missing provider/API-key errors after launch are not mobile problems.

mobile_codex_agent_launch.method: Mobile Run Setup in browser. Because mobile Run Setup exposes only 'Existing desktop defaults' and no runtime/model selector, a browser-only Pinia defaultLaunchConfig fixture was used to simulate Codex/GPT-5.5 desktop defaults for the Codex definition. No repository code or backend definition data was changed.
mobile_codex_agent_launch.initialMobileFirstMessageBehavior: Run was created and the local user message appeared, but no assistant response arrived from the mobile-launched first message. GraphQL projection stayed empty for the first message, and run history showed the run active/idle with empty summary.
mobile_codex_agent_launch.blockingEvidence: round10-codex-direct-websocket-probe.log shows the same run's SEND_MESSAGE without message_id/dedupe_key is rejected with INVALID_COMMAND_ID: message_id must be a non-empty string no longer than 128 characters.
mobile_codex_agent_launch.backendControlProbe: round10-codex-direct-websocket-with-identity.log sent the same run a SEND_MESSAGE with message_id/dedupe_key; backend accepted it, started Codex/GPT-5.5, streamed response text, and the mobile Chat rendered the assistant response.

status_validation.mixedStatus: Pass: status endpoint unavailable while authorized catalog/work data succeeds showed Node reachable · Phone Access status unavailable.
status_validation.currentCycleTrueFailure: Pass: after switching to an unreachable node URL, refresh showed Offline / Cannot reach AutoByteus desktop instead of using stale authorizedApiReachable.

journey_validation_already_observed_in_r: Home node/status/primary action/recent work rendered with real local data.
Continue latest run opened existing Software Engineering Team chat with composer.
Bottom nav rendered one task surface at a time for Chat/Runs/Files/Activity.
Activity filters/digest rendered errors/tool rows and unsupported phone notice.
Files preview rendered README.md content; attach showed Attached · 1 and Chat context tray.
Desktop /workspace did not render mobile shell.
blocking_issue: Single-agent WebSocket SEND_MESSAGE from the frontend omits backend-required message_id/dedupe_key. Team streaming already includes identity; single-agent AgentStreamingService does not. Mobile new Codex run can be configured and created, but the first message is rejected/ignored and the UI gives no visible rejection/error. This blocks mobile functional parity for new single-agent launches and likely affects shared desktop single-agent sends through the same service.
